title: Decadent Crunchy Indian Potato Toast
description: A rich, cheesy, and satisfying Indian-inspired snack made with roasted Jersey Royal potatoes, toasted bread, and a blend of spices.
instructions: Cut the potatoes into 1-inch pieces and toss with 2 tablespoons of butter, garam masala, cumin powder, turmeric powder, red chili flakes, and salt until they are evenly coated.
Spread the potatoes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and roast in the oven for 20 minutes, or until they are tender and lightly browned.
Meanwhile, toast the baguette slices until they are lightly browned.
In a saucepan over medium heat, melt the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter.
Add the shredded gruyere cheese to the saucepan and stir until it is melted and smooth.
To assemble the toast, place a toasted baguette slice on a plate, followed by a few pieces of roasted potatoes, and then spoon some of the cheesy sauce over the top.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
